findings.issue: anySignal function lacks direct unit tests
findings.remediation: Add tests exercising edge cases: both signals already aborted when passed, one signal aborts first then the other, and the case where one signal never fires (listener cleanup). Currently only indirectly covered through makeRequest tests.

findings.issue: Token from useParams() interpolated into URL path without encodeURIComponent
findings.remediation: Use encodeURIComponent(token) in the returnTo URL construction to match the defensive encoding used in api.ts:43 and api.ts:55 for API calls.

findings.issue: InvitationCompletePage discards return_to query param and always redirects to home
findings.remediation: Consider reading a return_to query param (like OAuthCallbackPage does) and redirecting to it after successful invitation acceptance instead of always going to the base URL.
